flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Spokane Community College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Spokane Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Spokane Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
